Run the project test suite via Bun test (passthrough placeholder)

Usage:
  laurel test [args...]

Arguments:
  args                Arguments forwarded to `bun test` after Laurel prints a passthrough warning

End of options:
  Use `--` before positional values that start with `-`, for example `laurel new post -- --config`.

Options:
  -h, --help          Show help for this command

Examples:
  laurel test                                  # run bun test
  laurel test tests/cli/parse.test.ts          # forward a path to bun test
